character_dossiers.name: Israel Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Found propped against bulwarks, bleeding, and weakened after a struggle. Later given brandy and referred to as 'Mr. Hands' by the narrator.

character_dossiers.name: the man with the red cap
character_dossiers.biography: Described as stiff and motionless with arms outstretched, teeth exposed, and blood splashed around. Referred to as 'the man with the red cap' and implied to be dead.
